title: Rosie Sling (Full size)
description: This adorable Rosie Sling in the original size is roomy enough to care all your essentials.  You can wear it crossbody in the front or the back.  The design also allows you to wear it on the right or left side.  It has an exterior slip pocket, an interior slip pocket and a double zipper closure.  Made of faux leather and bonded nylon so it is easy to keep clean.
